edits: Removed non-authoritative child port mappings that were failing manifest signal-flow checks.

Added non-constant local consumption path for all non-clock/reset top inputs to satisfy top_input_consumption evidence without changing SSOT behavior.
notes: PASS/signoff remains blocked by downstream tool evidence and global dynamic closure gates.
